stories.title: Sights, sounds and more second-round moments
stories.summary: Here is the best of the action from Friday at Aronimink Golf Club.

stories.title: Ex-ACU player banned for allegedly fixing games
stories.summary: A former Abilene Christian men's basketball player was permanently banned by the NCAA on Friday for allegedly helping rig basketball games for sports bettors.

stories.title: Michigan men: Woodson Jr. tabs dad's Wolverines
stories.summary: Four-star defensive back Charles Woodson Jr. has committed to Michigan, where his father was a two-time All-American and the winner of the 1997 Heisman Trophy.

stories.title: Club pro Block likely to miss PGA cut, vows return...
stories.summary: Club professional Michael Block is expected to miss the cut at the PGA Championship after carding a 75 on Friday, but the popular fan favorite is confident it won't be his last time in the field.

stories.title: NFL pushes back on criticism of streaming games
stories.summary: The NFL is defending its expanded lineup of games on streaming platforms amid criticism from President Donald Trump and scrutiny from the U.S. Justice Department.
